question: Universal Containers' administrator has developed a new agent in a sandbox environment and now wants to deploy it to production. What should the administrator do to deploy an agent?
options: Export agent components as JSON files and manually import them into production using the Metadata API.
Create an outbound change set with all the necessary agent components, then upload to production.
Manually recreate the agent configuration, topics, and actions in production because change sets cannot be used.
explanation: Los agentes, sus temas (topics) y las acciones asociadas son tipos de metadatos nativos dentro de la plataforma de Salesforce. Por lo tanto, el procedimiento oficial y recomendado para migrar esta configuración de un entorno de desarrollo a producción es crear un conjunto de cambios saliente (outbound change set) que incluya todos los componentes del agente para su despliegue.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is using Einstein Generative AI to generate an account summary. UC aims to ensure the content is safe and inclusive, utilizing the Einstein Trust Layer's toxicity scoring to assess the content's safety level.
What does a safety category score of 1 indicate in the Einstein Generative Al Toxicity Score?
options: Not safe
Safe
Moderately safe
explanation: En el sistema de puntuación de toxicidad de la Einstein Trust Layer, una puntuación de categoría de seguridad de 1 indica que el contenido es seguro (Safe). Puntuaciones más altas indican mayor probabilidad de contenido tóxico o inseguro.

question:
Universal Containers wants to make a sales proposal and directly use data from multiple unrelated objects (standard and custom) in a prompt template. 
What should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Create a Flex template to add resources with standard and custom objects as inputs.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object that connects the records temporarily,
Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from standard and custom objects.
explanation: Un Flex Template permite agregar múltiples recursos de objetos estándar y personalizados como inputs, siendo la solución correcta para prompts que necesitan datos de objetos no relacionados. Las plantillas estándar están limitadas a un objeto base y no admiten múltiples fuentes de datos independientes.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to assess Salesforce's generative Al features but has concerns over its company data being exposed to third party large language models (LLMs). Specifically, UC wants the following capabilities to be part of Einstein's generative AI service.
- No data is used for LLM training or product improvements by third-party LLMs.
- No data is retained outside of UC's Salesforce org.
- The data sent cannot be accessed by the LLM provider.
Which property of the Einstein Trust Layer should the AI Specialist highlight to UC that addresses these requirements?
options: Prompt Defense
Zero-Data Retention Policy
Data Masking
explanation: La Política de Retención Cero de Datos (Zero-Data Retention Policy) es un acuerdo contractual con proveedores de LLM de terceros (como OpenAI o Anthropic) que garantiza que no almacenan ni utilizan los datos de los clientes de Salesforce (prompts o respuestas) para el entrenamiento de modelos o registros (logging).

question: Universal Containers wants to leverage the Record Snapshots grounding feature in a prompt template. What preparations are required?
options: Configure page layout of the master record type.
Create a field set for all the fields to be grounded.
Enable and configure dynamic form for the object.
explanation: Record Snapshots grounding relies on the fields visible on the master record type page layout, not field sets. Therefore, configuring the page layout is the required preparation.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to capture and store detailed interaction data for all agents. Which feature should help UC get a full view of the agent's behavior from start to finish, including reasoning engine executions, actions, prompt and gateway inputs/outputs, error messages, and final responses?
options: Agentforce Analytics
Utterance Analysis
Agentforce Session Tracing
explanation: Agentforce Session Tracing proporciona una vista completa del comportamiento del agente de principio a fin, incluyendo ejecuciones del reasoning engine, acciones, inputs/outputs del prompt y gateway, mensajes de error y respuestas finales. Es la herramienta mas detallada para analisis de sesiones de agente.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is creating a custom action in Agentforce. Which type of reference action provides the most flexibility for implementing complex business logic?
options: Apex.
Prompt Template.
Flows.
explanation: Apex provides the most flexibility for implementing complex business logic, allowing for advanced data processing, integrations, and logic that cannot be easily achieved using declarative tools like Flows.

question: A Universal Containers administrator is setting up Einstein Data Libraries. After creating a new library, the administrator notices that only the file upload option is available; there is no option to configure the library using a Salesforce Knowledge base. What is the most likely cause of this issue?
options: Salesforce Knowledge is not enabled in the organization; without Salesforce Knowledge enabled, the Knowledge-based data source option will not be available in Einstein Data Libraries.
The current Salesforce org lacks the necessary Einstein for Service permissions that support the Knowledge-based Data Library option, so only the file upload option is presented.
The administrator is not using Lightning Experience, which is required to display all data source options, including the Knowledge base option, when configuring Einstein Data Libraries.
explanation: Si Knowledge no está habilitado, no aparece la opción de Knowledge-based source.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has implemented Generative AI within Salesforce to enable summarization of a custom object called Guest. Users have reported mismatches in the generated information. In refining its prompt design strategy, which key practices should UC prioritize?
options: Create concise, clear, and consistent prompt templates with effective grounding, contextual role-playing, clear instructions, and iterative feedback.
Enable prompt test mode, allocate different prompt variations to a subset of users for evaluation, and standardize the most effective model based on performance feedback.
Submit a prompt review case to Salesforce and conduct thorough testing in the playground to refine outputs until they meet user expectations.
explanation: Use prompts concisos, claros y grounding fuertes con feedback iterativo.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is trying to set up a new Field Generation prompt template. They take the following steps: 1. Create a new Field Generation prompt template. 2. Choose Case as the object type. 3. Select the custom field AI_Analysis__c as the target field. After creating the prompt template, the Agentforce Specialist saves, tests, and activates it. However, when they go to a case record, the AI Analysis field does not show the ✨ (Sparkle) icon on the Edit pencil. When the Agentforce Specialist was editing the field, it was behaving as a normal field. Which critical step did the Agentforce Specialist miss?
options: They forgot to edit the Lightning page layout and associate the field to a prompt template.
They forgot to reactivate the Lightning page layout for the Case object after activating their Field Generation prompt template.
They forgot that the Case object is not supported for field generation as Einstein Service Replies should be used instead.
explanation: Faltó asociar el campo al prompt template en el layout de Lightning.

question: Universal Containers needs to create a prompt template that provides a detailed product description based on the latest product data. The description will be used in marketing materials to ensure consistency and accuracy. Which prompt template type should UC use?
options: Record Summary
Sales Email
Field Generation
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo correcto para generar una descripcion de producto detallada que se almacene en un campo especifico del registro. Permite generar contenido de IA para un campo individual con revision humana, ideal para garantizar consistencia y precision en materiales de marketing.

question:
Universal Containers is considering leveraging the Einstein Trust Layer in conjunction with Einstein Generative AI Audit Data. 
Which audit data is available using the Einstein Trust Layer?
options: Response accuracy and offensiveness score
Hallucination score and bias score
Masked data and toxicity score
explanation: El Einstein Trust Layer proporciona datos de auditoría que incluyen datos enmascarados y puntuación de toxicidad, no métricas de precisión de respuesta ni puntuaciones de alucinación. Estos datos de auditoría permiten revisar qué información fue procesada y filtrada durante las interacciones de IA.

question: Universal Containers (UC) uses standard Service AI Grounding. UC created a custom rich text field to be used with Service AI Grounding. What should UC consider when using standard Service AI Grounding?
options: Service AI Grounding only works with Case and Knowledge objects.
Service AI Grounding only supports String and Text Area type fields.
Service AI Grounding visibility works in system mode.
explanation: Service AI Grounding solo admite campos de tipo String y Text Area. No es compatible con campos de Rich Text. La afirmacion de que Service AI Grounding funciona en system mode es un distractor incorrecto, ya que respeta la visibilidad y permisos del usuario.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts wants to handle frequent customer misspellings of package names in queries. Which approach should the Agentforce Specialist implement?
options: Hybrid search
Vector search
Keyword search
explanation: The original answer included 'Keyword search', which is incorrect because keyword search relies on exact literal matches and completely fails on misspellings. The correct approach is Hybrid search, which leverages the semantic capabilities of vector embeddings to understand misspellings while combining it with keyword search for optimal overall results.

question: Universal Containers is rolling out a new generative AI initiative. Which Prompt Builder limitations should the Agentforce Specialist be aware of?
options: Rich text area fields are only supported in Flex template types.
Creations or updates to the prompt templates are not recorded in the Setup Audit Trail.
Custom objects are supported only for Flex template types.
explanation: Una limitacion importante de Prompt Builder es que las creaciones y actualizaciones de prompt templates no se registran en el Setup Audit Trail de Salesforce. Esto es relevante para organizaciones con requisitos estrictos de auditoria de cambios de configuracion.

question:
An AI Specialist configured Data Masking within the Einstein Trust Layer.
How should the AI Specialist begin validating that the correct fields are being masked?
options: Use a Flow-based resource in Prompt Builder to debug the fields’ merge values using Flow Debugger.
Request the Einstein Generative AI Audit Data from the Security section of the Setup menu.
Enable the collection and storage of Einstein Generative AI Audit Data on the Einstein Feedback setup page.
explanation: The new answer is correct because the AI Specialist should review the Einstein Generative AI Audit Data from the Security section in Setup, which logs the masked and unmasked prompts. The original answer was incorrect because Audit Data is not enabled from the Einstein Feedback setup page.

question: Before activating a custom Agent action, an Agentforce Specialist would like to understand multiple real-world user utterances to ensure the action is being selected appropriately. Which tool should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Agent Builder
Model Playground
Agentforce
explanation: Agent Builder provides the testing environment (Planner) to enter user utterances and observe the reasoning engine's plan, including which topics and actions are selected. Model Playground is used for testing Prompt Templates, not Agent Actions.

question: Universal Containers is indexing millions of product manuals where users may ask both structured queries (model numbers) and natural language Questions (for example, "How do I reset my device?"). Which retrieval approach should the company use?
options: Use keyword search only, since model numbers dominate queries.
Use semantic search only, as natural language is always preferred.
Use hybrid search to combine keyword precision with semantic flexibility.
explanation: La búsqueda híbrida (Hybrid search) combina la precisión de la búsqueda por palabras clave (ideal para identificadores estructurados como números de modelo) con la flexibilidad de la búsqueda semántica (necesaria para comprender el contexto de las preguntas en lenguaje natural). Esta es la estrategia recomendada por Salesforce para optimizar la relevancia de los resultados cuando existen ambos tipos de consultas.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to ground a new prompt template with the User related list.
What should the AI Specialist consider?
options: The User related list should have View All access.
The User related list needs to be included on the record page.
The User related list is not supported in prompt templates.
explanation: El objeto Usuario (User) y sus listas relacionadas no están soportadas actualmente para ser utilizadas directamente como listas relacionadas (related lists) en el grounding de las plantillas de prompt (prompt templates).

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a prompt template to fill a custom field named Latest Opportunities Summary on the Account object with information from the three most recently opened opportunities.
How should the AI Specialist gather the necessary data for the prompt template?
options: Create a flow to retrieve the opportunity information.
Select the Account Opportunity object as a resource when creating the prompt template.
Select the latest Opportunities related list as a merge field.
explanation: The new answer is correct because an autolaunched flow allows for complex logic, such as sorting and limiting the returned records (e.g., retrieving exactly the three most recently opened opportunities) to pass into the prompt template. The original answer was incorrect because simply selecting the Opportunity object as a resource does not provide the capability to restrict and sort the related records to just the top three.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to improve the agent productivity in replying to customer chats. Which generative AI feature should help UC address this issue?
options: Case Summaries
Service Replies
Case Escalation
explanation: Service Replies genera respuestas sugeridas en tiempo real durante conversaciones de chat, mejorando directamente la productividad de los agentes al reducir el tiempo de escritura. Case Summaries resume el caso pero no ayuda con las respuestas en chat en tiempo real.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts is about to start testing its concierge agent with guests. Which metrics should be captured to monitor the performance, correctness, and user experience?
options: Agent performance, token usage, and conversation duration
Response performance, tone, and CSATs
Response times, accuracy and relevance of answers, and resolution success
explanation: Las metricas mas relevantes para monitorear performance, exactitud y experiencia de usuario son: tiempos de respuesta (performance), precision y relevancia de las respuestas (correctness), y exito en la resolucion (user experience). Estas tres dimensiones cubren los requisitos de monitoreo del agente.

question: Universal Containers has multiple Salesforce orgs, each with a unique customer service agent where a verification agent must pass customer identity data to downstream agents handling account modifications. The customer ID must remain secure and persistent across agent handoffs without exposure to LLM modification. What is the most appropriate configuration?
options: Implement a custom object to temporarily store verification status and have each agent query it via SOQL actions during execution.
Store customer identity information in conversation variables created by the first agent and have other agents read those same conversation variables.
Use the Agent API to start the downstream agent's session and pass the verified customer ID as a read-only context variable, ensuring security and preventing LLM alteration.
explanation: Para transferir datos de identidad de forma segura entre agentes en distintos orgs, la solucion correcta es usar el Agent API para iniciar la sesion del agente downstream y pasar el customer ID verificado como una context variable de solo lectura. Esto garantiza seguridad, persistencia y previene que el LLM modifique datos criticos de identidad.

question: What does it mean when a prompt template version is described as immutable?
options: Every modification on a template will be saved as a new version automatically.
After a prompt template version is activated, no further changes can be saved to that version.
Only the latest version of a template can be activated.
explanation: En el contexto de Prompt Builder, una vez que una versión específica de una plantilla de prompt ha sido guardada en un estado final o ha sido activada, se vuelve inmutable. Esto significa que ya no se pueden realizar ni sobrescribir cambios en esa misma versión; cualquier modificación posterior obligará a guardar y activar una versión nueva, protegiendo así la integridad de la automatización en producción.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: The original answer incorrectly claimed the A2A protocol is for 'internal' agent discovery. The correct answer is that the key benefit of the A2A protocol is providing a standardized framework for 'cross-vendor' agent discovery and communication, allowing Salesforce agents to collaborate seamlessly with third-party external agents.

question: Where should the Agentforce Specialist go to add/update actions assigned to a copilot?
options: Copilot Actions page, the record page for the copilot action, or the Copilot Action Library tab
Copilot Actions page or Global Actions
Copilot Detail page, Global Actions, or the record page for the copilot action
explanation: Para agregar o actualizar acciones de un copilot, el Agentforce Specialist debe ir a la pagina de Copilot Actions, al record page de la accion especifica, o a la pestana Copilot Action Library. Estas tres ubicaciones permiten gestionar las acciones asignadas al agente.

question: What should an AI Specialist consider when using related list merge fields in a prompt template associated with an Account object in Prompt Builder?
options: The Activities related list on the Account object Is not supported because it is a polymorphic field.
If person accounts have been enabled, merge fields will not be available for the Account object.
Prompt generation will yield no response when there is no related list associated with an Account in runtime.
explanation: Prompt Builder has limitations with polymorphic fields. The Activities related list (Tasks and Events) on the Account object is polymorphic and is not supported as a direct merge field for grounding.

question: A Salesforce Administrator wants to generate personalized, targeted emails that incorporate customer interaction data. The admin wants to leverage large language models (LLMs) to write the emails, and wants to reuse templates for different products and customers. Which solution approach should the admin leverage?
options: Create a Sales Email prompt template type.
Use Sales Email standard templates.
Create a Field Generation prompt template type.
explanation: Crear plantilla de prompt de Sales Email reutilizable para diferentes clientes.

question: The Agentforce Specialist for Cloud Kicks wants to create an agent that will allow the sales staff to schedule their daily tasks and assist in providing detailed explanations behind product prices and deals. Following Salesforce best practices, which type of agent should they create?
options: Service Agent
Employee Agent
Sales Agent
explanation: Sales Agent es el tipo correcto para ayudar al personal de ventas a programar tareas diarias y proporcionar explicaciones sobre precios y deals. Salesforce recomienda usar Sales Agent para flujos de trabajo especificos de ventas que involucran gestion de oportunidades y soporte al proceso de venta.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to include data from the response of external service invocation (REST API callout) into the prompt template. 
How should the AI Specialist meet this requirement?
options: Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use External Service Record merge fields.
Use “Add Prompt Instructions” flow element.
explanation: Al usar un Flujo de Prompt Activado por Plantilla (Template-Triggered Prompt Flow), puedes realizar llamadas a API REST externas (callouts) y añadir los datos o el JSON recuperado al prompt usando el elemento de flujo 'Agregar Instrucciones de Prompt' (Add Prompt Instructions).

question: Universal Containers aims to streamline the sales team's daily tasks by using AI. When considering these new workflows, which improvement requires the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Populate an AI-generated time-to-close estimation to opportunities
Populate an AI-generated summary field for sales contracts.
Populate an AI-generated lead score for new leads.
explanation: Poblar un campo de resumen generado por IA para contratos de ventas requiere Prompt Builder con un Field Generation template. Time-to-close y lead score son predicciones que usan modelos predictivos de Einstein, no Prompt Builder.

question:
Universal Containers has an active standard email prompt template that does not fully deliver on the business requirements. 
Which steps should an AI Specialist take to use the content of the standard prompt email template in question and customize it to fully meet the business requirements?
options: Save as New Template and edit as needed.
Clone the existing template and modify as needed.
Save as New Version and edit as needed.
explanation: Las plantillas de prompt estándar son de solo lectura y no pueden clonarse directamente ni guardarse como una nueva versión. Para personalizarlas, se debe usar 'Guardar como nueva plantilla' (Save as New Template) para crear una copia editable.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has configured Agentforce Data Library using Knowledge articles. When testing in Agent Builder and the Experience Cloud site, the agent is not responding with grounded Knowledge article information. However, when tested in Prompt Builder, the response returns correctly. What should UC do to troubleshoot the issue?
options: Ensure the assigned User permission set includes access to the prompt template used to access the Knowledge articles.
Create a new permission set that assigns “Manage Knowledge” and assign it to the Agentforce Service Agent User.
Ensure the Data Cloud User permission set has been assigned to the Agentforce Service Agent User.
explanation: The Agentforce Service Agent User executes the agent in Agent Builder and Experience Cloud and must have the 'Data Cloud User' permission set assigned to access the Data Library successfully.

question: Universal Containers wants to leverage the Record Snapshots grounding feature in a prompt template. What preparations are required?
options: Configure page layout of the master record type.
Create a field set for all the fields to be grounded.
Enable and configure dynamic form for the object.
explanation: Record Snapshots grounding relies on the fields visible on the master record type page layout, not field sets. Therefore, configuring the page layout is the required preparation.

question: An account manager is preparing for an upcoming customer call and wishes to get a snapshot of key data points from accounts, contacts, leads, and opportunities in Salesforce. Which feature provides this?
options: Sales Summaries
Sales Insight Summary
Work Summaries
explanation: Sales Summaries proporciona un resumen rapido de los puntos de datos clave de cuentas, contactos, leads y oportunidades de Salesforce, preparando al account manager antes de una llamada. Work Summaries es para casos de servicio y Sales Insight Summary no es una feature estandar de Salesforce.

question: Universal Containers is building a digital shopping assistant that needs to dynamically generate product recommendations using information from the company's external product recommendation predictive model through APIs. Which Agentforce capability should make it easier for the agent to consume the external product recommendation tool?
options: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Hugging Face
Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol
explanation: Model Context Protocol (MCP) es la capacidad de Agentforce que permite al agente descubrir y consumir dinamicamente herramientas y APIs externas, como un modelo predictivo de recomendaciones de productos. MCP facilita la integracion con herramientas externas de forma estandarizada sin necesidad de codificacion custom.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to offer personalized service experiences and reduce agent handling time with Al-generated email responses, grounded in Knowledge base.
Which AI capability should UC use?
options: Einstein Email Replies
Einstein Service Replies for Email
Einstein Generative Service Replies for Email
explanation: Einstein Service Replies para correo electrónico (Einstein Service Replies for Email) es la capacidad diseñada específicamente para redactar borradores de respuestas a correos de clientes basándose en la base de conocimientos (Knowledge base).

question: Universal Containers has a new AI project. What should an Agentforce Specialist consider when adding a related list on the Account object to be used in the prompt template?
options: After selecting a related list from the Account, use the field picker to choose merge fields in Prompt Builder.
Prompt Builder must be used to assign the fields from the related list as a JSON format.
The fields for the related list are based on the default page layout of the Account for the current user.
explanation: Al agregar una related list del objeto Account en un prompt template, los campos disponibles como merge fields estan basados en el page layout predeterminado del Account para el usuario actual. Si el campo no esta en el page layout, no aparecera como opcion de merge field en Prompt Builder.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts wants to cover a broad range of user phrasing when testing its FAQ agent. Which Testing Center feature meets that need?
options: AI-generated synthetic test utterances based on natural language variations
Uploading only a small set of manually written prompts
Relying on live customer logs to capture phrasing diversity after deployment
explanation: El Testing Center puede generar sinteticamente utterances de prueba basadas en variaciones de lenguaje natural usando IA, permitiendo cubrir una amplia diversidad de formas en que los usuarios podrian formular sus preguntas sin necesidad de escribirlas manualmente o esperar datos de produccion.

question: When is the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol an appropriate communication choice?
options: When agents need to invoke third-party APIs
When agents need to access tools
When agents need to collaborate
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) es apropiado cuando los agentes necesitan colaborar entre si, delegando tareas o compartiendo contexto. Para invocar APIs de terceros se usa MCP, y para acceder a herramientas tambien se usa MCP. A2A es especificamente para colaboracion y comunicacion entre agentes.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to implement an Al-powered customer service agent that can  Retrieve proprietary policy documents that are stored as PDFs.  Ensure responses are grounded in approved company data, not generic LLM knowledge. What should UC do first?
options: Add the files to the content, and then select the data library option.
Expand the Al agent's scope to search all Salesforce records.
Set up an Agentforce Data Library for AI retrieval of policy documents.
explanation: Para fundamentar las respuestas del agente en documentos PDF no estructurados y evitar alucinaciones, el primer paso es establecer una fuente de datos estructurada. Esto implica configurar una Biblioteca de Datos (Data Library) o un índice de búsqueda vectorial en Data Cloud, lo que permite al agente recuperar y leer estos documentos durante su razonamiento.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has registered an external service in Salesforce. UC wants to use the response from the external service as a merge field in a prompt template. Which element in the template-triggered prompt flow should UC use to make this data available as a merge field?
options: Use External Service Record merge fields.
Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use the 'Add Prompt Instructions' flow element.
explanation: Para utilizar datos provenientes de un servicio externo dentro de un template-triggered prompt flow, se debe invocar la acción del servicio externo y luego utilizar el elemento de flujo específico llamado Add Prompt Instructions. Este elemento es el encargado de tomar los resultados del flujo e incrustarlos como instrucciones o contexto disponible dentro de la plantilla del prompt.

question: Universal Containers (UC) plans to implement prompt templates that utilize the standard foundation models. Which technique should UC use to get more contextual and relevant responses from the LLM?
options: Ask it to role-play as a character in the prompt template to provide more context to the LLM.
Increase the max tokens parameter to allow longer responses.
Use only keyword-based grounding to ensure deterministic outputs.
explanation: Pedir al LLM que adopte el rol de un personaje especifico (role-play) en el prompt template es una tecnica efectiva para obtener respuestas mas contextuales y relevantes. Esta tecnica de prompt engineering ayuda al modelo a generar respuestas mas alineadas con el caso de uso especifico.

question: Universal Containers needs to restrict access to refund processing actions so only customers with Active account status can initiate refunds. How should an Agentforce Specialist apply the restriction deterministically?
options: Create a context variable for the account status field and apply a conditional filter AccountStatus equals "Active" to refund actions.
OInclude step-by-step instructions at the topic level and action level explaining the rules and examples.
Create a Flex Prompt Template that has instructions to check for account status.
explanation: Para imponer una restricción verdaderamente determinista (que no esté sujeta a la interpretación a veces impredecible de un LLM), la acción debe blindarse lógicamente. Al crear una variable de contexto con el estado de la cuenta y añadirle un filtro condicional que exija 'AccountStatus = Active' directamente a la acción de reembolso, el agente no podrá ejecutarla bajo ninguna circunstancia si no se cumple el requisito.

question: What is the primary function of the planner service in the Einstein Agentforce or copilot  system?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Offering real-time language translation during conversations
Identifying Agentforce or copilot  actions to respond to user utterances
explanation: Einstein Trust Layer actúa como intermediario seguro entre Salesforce y el LLM, enmascarando datos sensibles antes de enviar el prompt y desenmascando los datos en la respuesta. Esta arquitectura garantiza que información confidencial nunca sea enviada directamente al modelo externo.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to deploy an Agentforce Service Agent to support customers via a web experience. UC uses a Digital Experience site and wants to enable messaging for logged-in users. The customer needs to pass the membership number to the agent for which a pre-chat variable is available. What is a required step to connect the agent to the Digital Experience site using Messaging for In-App and Web?
options: Configure a messaging Lightning web component using standard or custom Lightning Type for Agentforce.
Create an Omni-Channel flow that routes messages to the agent.
Configure MuleSoft to establish a secure API tunnel between the agent and the Digital Experience site.
explanation: Para conectar un Service Agent a un sitio de Digital Experience usando Messaging for In-App and Web, se debe crear un flujo de Omni-Channel que enrute los mensajes al agente. Este flujo gestiona el enrutamiento y permite pasar variables pre-chat como el numero de membresia.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is Implementing Service AI Grounding to enhance its customer service operations. UC wants to ensure that its AI generated responses are grounded in the most relevant data sources. The team needs to configure the system to include all supported objects for grounding.
Which objects should UC select to configure Service AI Grounding?
options: Case, Knowledge, and Case Notes
Case and Knowledge
Case, Case Emails, and Knowledge
explanation: Para configurar Service AI Grounding (el enraizamiento de datos de IA para Servicio), los objetos base recomendados y principales a seleccionar son los Casos (Case) y los artículos de Conocimiento (Knowledge), ya que proveen el contexto de la consulta y las respuestas.

question: How is Data Cloud leveraged by the Answer Questions with Knowledge action in Agentforce?
options: Data Cloud stores and manages the indexed Knowledge articles.
Data Cloud is not required; the articles can be accessed directly from the CRM by the agent.
Data Cloud provides the real-time data streams that update the Knowledge articles.
explanation: Data Cloud se usa para almacenar y gestionar artículos de Knowledge indexados que el agente usa para respuestas fundamentadas; es el repositorio de contenido de Knowledge.

question: Universal Containers wants to use an AI agent to answer questions about warranties. Warranty information has already been uploaded as unstructured data in Data Cloud. When answering user questions, the results must be filterable by product line and ranked by recent updates. Which approach should the Agentforce Specialist implement?
options: Use the default retriever which automatically accounts for recency ranking.
Build a custom retriever in Einstein Studio with product line filters and recency ranking.
Apply semantic embeddings with default metadata filters to achieve the desired result.
explanation: Para filtrar por linea de producto y ordenar por actualizaciones recientes, se debe construir un retriever personalizado en Einstein Studio configurando esos filtros y el ranking de recencia especificamente. El retriever por defecto no ofrece ese nivel de configuracion personalizada.

question: How does Agentforce select the correct action to resolve a user's request?
options: Each topic contains a list of the matching action's user utterances so that the agent can map the user request to the right topic and action.
The large language model (LLM) selects the right topic and action, if they exist. If there are no matches, the LLM attempts to answer the user's request.
The reasoning engine identifies the agent action to be executed by its name and action input instructions.
explanation: Agentforce selecciona la accion correcta mediante el LLM, que evalua el topic y la accion mas apropiados basandose en las instrucciones configuradas. Si no encuentra coincidencias, el LLM intenta responder directamente la solicitud del usuario usando su conocimiento general.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts wants visibility into credit usage associated with testing. Which feature supports this?
options: Agentforce Analytics
Digital Wallet
Testing Center
explanation: Digital Wallet es la funcionalidad de Salesforce que proporciona visibilidad sobre el uso de creditos de Agentforce, incluyendo los asociados a las pruebas. Permite monitorear el consumo de Einstein Requests y otros creditos de IA.

question: Universal Containers (UC) implements a custom retriever to improve the accuracy of AI-generated responses. UC notices that the retriever is returning too many irrelevant results, making the responses less useful. What should UC do to ensure only relevant data is retrieved?
options: Define filters to narrow the search results based on specific conditions.
Change the search index to a different data model object (DMO).
Increase the maximum number of results returned to capture a broader dataset.
explanation: Defina filtros para restringir los resultados a datos relevantes.

question:
A sales rep at Universal Containers is extremely busy and sometimes will have very long sales calls on voice and video calls and might miss key details. They are just starting to adopt new generative AI features.
Which Einstein Generative AI feature should an AI Specialist recommend to help the rep get the details they might have missed during a conversation?
options: Call Summary
Call Explorer
Sales Summary
explanation: Call Explorer is the correct feature because it allows sales reps to ask natural language questions about a call transcript to find specific details they might have missed. Call Summary provides an overview but may not extract specific missed details. The original answer (Call Summary) was incorrect because it is designed to summarize the call rather than interactively explore it for specific details.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to use Flow to bring data from unified Data Cloud objects to prompt templates. Which type of flow should UC use?
options: Template-triggered prompt flow
Data Cloud-triggered flow
Unified-object linking flow
explanation: Use un template-triggered prompt flow para llevar datos a plantillas de prompts.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) tiene como beneficio clave proporcionar un marco estandarizado que permite a los agentes de diferentes proveedores descubrirse y comunicarse entre sí de forma segura, facilitando la interoperabilidad entre distintos ecosistemas de IA.

question: What is a valid use case for Data Cloud retrievers?
options: Storing and managing CRM records in Data Cloud.
Synchronizing data between Salesforce orgs in real time.
Returning relevant data from the vector database to augment a prompt.
explanation: Un caso de uso valido para los retrievers de Data Cloud es recuperar datos relevantes de la base de datos vectorial para aumentar (augment) un prompt con informacion contextual. Esta es la funcion principal del retriever en el patron RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).

question: Universal Containers (UC) is implementing generative AI and wants to leverage a prompt template to provide personalized product recommendations to website visitors based on their browsing history. Which initial step should UC take to ensure the chatbot can deliver accurate recommendations?
options: Design universal product recommendations.
Write a response script for the chatbot.
Collect and analyze browsing data.
explanation: El paso inicial correcto es recopilar y analizar los datos de navegacion, ya que estos son la fuente de grounding que permitira al prompt template generar recomendaciones personalizadas. Sin datos de navegacion disponibles y analizados, el template no tiene contexto para personalizar las recomendaciones.

question:
Universal Containers wants to use an external large language model (LLM) in Prompt Builder.
What should an AI Specialist recommend?
options: Use Apex to connect to an external LLM and ground the prompt.
Use BYO-LLM functionality in Einstein Studio,
Use Flow and External Services to bring data from an external LLM.
explanation: Para utilizar un modelo LLM externo (como los de OpenAI, Anthropic o modelos propios) en Prompt Builder, se debe usar la funcionalidad Bring Your Own LLM (BYO-LLM) a través de Einstein Studio Model Builder.

question:
When configuring a prompt template, an AI Specialist previews the results of the prompt template they've written. They see two distinct text outputs: Resolution and Response.
Which information does the Resolution text provide?
options: It shows the full text that is sent to the Trust Layer.
It shows the response from the LLM based on the sample record.
It shows which sensitive data is masked before it is sent to the LLM.
explanation: The new answer is correct because the 'Resolution' text in Prompt Builder shows the fully resolved prompt text (including merged data) that is sent to the LLM via the Trust Layer. The original answer was incorrect because the 'Response' section, not the 'Resolution', shows the LLM's generated response.

question: Universal Containers aims to streamline the sales team's daily tasks by using AI. When considering these new workflows, which improvement requires the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Populate an AI-generated time-to-close estimation to opportunities
Populate an AI-generated summary field for sales contracts.
Populate an AI-generated lead score for new leads.
explanation: Poblar un campo de resumen generado por IA para contratos de ventas requiere Prompt Builder con un Field Generation template. Time-to-close y lead score son predicciones que usan modelos predictivos de Einstein, no Prompt Builder.
